step_rationale: Fibrin-derived peptide targeting reperfusion injury from thrombus lysis.
mechanism: FX-06 is a fibrin-derived peptide that mitigates ischemia-reperfusion injury following coronary thrombus resolution.

references.title: FX-06, a fibrin-derived Bbeta15-42 peptide for the potential treatment of reperfusion injury following myocardial infarction.
references.journal: Current opinion in investigational drugs (London, England : 2000)
